title: Home - Green & Spiegel
content:
## A Canadian and U.S. immigration law firm
Green & Spiegel is a leading Canadian and U.S. immigration law firm with deep expertise — delivering clear strategy, responsive communication, and rigorous representation for its clients.

### Canadian Immigration

## Exceptional Immigration Legal Services
North America’s trusted partner in immigration law, providing innovative and strategic solutions to get the work done. Our track record speaks to the fact that we provide our clients with an unparalleled level of excellence in immigration legal services. With over 60 years of experience exclusively practicing immigration law, Green & Spiegel can assist you with any type of immigration application in Canada or the United States.

## Green & Spiegel provides the full suite of immigration services for Canada and the U.S.
